expected.title: OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events

text:
The email was sent to 'oncall@acme.io' with subject 'Top error' and body:  
**"Top error: search"**  

This corresponds to the unresolved Sentry issue in the 'search' project with the highest event count. The action is confirmed via the returned email row.

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"INSERT INTO emails (to_addr, subject, body) SELECT 'oncall@acme.io' AS to_addr, 'Top error' AS subject, 'Top error: ' || project AS body FROM sentry_issues WHERE status = 'unresolved' ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1 RETURNING *;","params":[]}
